label: 簇状散布
description: 簇状散布填充，density/count 两模式。mode=density（默认）在区域内随机选 ~目标格数/6 个簇心，以 (1-dist/(R+1))*density*2 的距离衰减概率向半径内散点，达 density×有效格数 截停；mode=count 改为精确格数：对所有簇心覆盖到的有效格按 score=(1-dist/(R+1))+rng()*0.2 打分，降序取前 count 个（fillClusterCount）。clusterRadius 决定簇扩散半径。可用于成片植被、矿脉、碎石堆等聚团散布。
description-en: Cluster scatter fill in density or count mode. mode=density (default) picks ~targetCount/6 centers and scatters within radius with distance-decaying probability (1-dist/(R+1))*density*2, stopping at density×validCells; mode=count fills an exact number: score each covered valid cell as (1-dist/(R+1))+rng()*0.2 and take the top count in descending order (fillClusterCount). clusterRadius controls spread radius. Usable for patchy vegetation, ore veins, rubble piles.
icon: 深色背景上几处密集成团的小点聚集分布，团块之间留白，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；点只能落在非零有效格内。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; points only land on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: density
inputs.label: 目标密度
inputs.description: 目标铺设密度（占有效格比例），0..1。同时决定簇心数量（约 目标格数/6）与扩散强度。
inputs.description-en: Target fill density (fraction of valid cells), 0..1. Also drives the number of centers (~targetCount/6) and spread strength.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: 填充模式
inputs.description: density=按密度概率散点（默认，向后兼容）；count=按簇心打分降序取精确格数。
inputs.description-en: density = probabilistic scatter by density (default, backward compatible); count = exact-count by cluster score ranking.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 目标格数
inputs.description: count 模式：精确选中的格数（超过有效格数则取全部）。
inputs.description-en: count mode: exact number of cells selected (clamped to valid cells).

inputs.name: clusterRadius
inputs.label: 簇半径
inputs.description: 每个簇心的扩散半径（格）。半径越大簇越松散、越大片。
inputs.description-en: Spread radius (cells) of each cluster center. Larger radius makes looser, larger clumps.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 散布网格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 0/1 点掩码，选中格=1，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: A 0/1 point mask matching the input shape; chosen cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 选中格数
outputs.description: 实际选中为 1 的格数。
outputs.description-en: Number of cells actually selected as 1.
